app.name: Pymss Studio
app.tagline: Professional AI-powered audio source separation workstation

separate.title: Separation Task Setup
separate.subtitle: Configure input audio, the separation model, and output options to start a task.
separate.outputLocationHint: Choose where separated results are saved and the file format.
separate.runOptionsHint: Control how this separation task is executed.
separate.inputPlaceholder: Choose an audio/video file or input folder
separate.separateTaskOutputDirHint: Each audio file is a separate task. When on, output goes to a subfolder named after the task ID; when off, it writes directly to the target folder and may overwrite files.
separate.audioQualityHint: These parameters apply to the current separation task and will be saved as future defaults.
separate.inputPanelHint: Choose one or more audio/video files, or an entire folder as the separation source.
separate.modelPanelHint: Only downloaded models that support inference are shown.
separate.outputPanelHint: Set output directory, format, runtime parameters, and audio quality.
separate.advancedPanelHint: Optional inference parameters. Defaults work for most tasks.
separate.advancedPanelLoading: Loading inference parameters for the current model…
separate.advancedPanelEmpty: This model has no advanced inference parameters to display.
separate.inputPathHint: Choose an audio/video file or input folder
separate.settingsDrawerHint: Configure the output directory, format, audio quality, and advanced inference parameters. Changes apply to the current task and are saved as defaults.
separate.startHintReady: Configuration is ready. Click the button to start separation.
separate.startHintModelMissing: The selected model is not downloaded. Download it in the Model Library or pick another.
separate.modelPanelLoadingDesc: Reading the local model list. Please wait.
separate.modelPanelEmptyDesc: Load local models first, or go to the Model Library to download them.
separate.modelSearchPlaceholder: Search model name, purpose, target stem, or architecture
separate.modelSearchEmpty: No matching downloaded models. Adjust the search keyword or category filter.
separate.dropHint: Drop an audio/video file or folder here
separate.dropUnsupported: Unsupported file type. Choose an audio/video file or folder.
separate.stepInputDesc: Pick audio or video to separate
separate.candidateEmpty: No files added yet. Choose files or a folder, or drop them directly here.
separate.folderEmpty: No supported audio/video files found in this folder
separate.inputAudioStreamMissing: Audio track read failed: no usable audio stream found ({path})
separate.inputMediaUnsupported: Audio track read failed or media format is unsupported: {path}
separate.audioQualityEditable: Adjust the parameters below to configure the output quality for this task.

inference.deviceIdsPlaceholder: Separate multiple IDs with commas, for example 0,1

tasks.title: Task Queue
tasks.subtitle: Monitor separation task progress, execution logs, and history.
tasks.emptyHint: No task records yet. Start a separation task to monitor progress and execution logs here.
tasks.clearHistoryConfirm: This clears completed, failed, and cancelled records from the task page only. The results page and generated output files are not affected. Continue?
tasks.cancelAllConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to cancel all currently running tasks? This will affect every active task.
tasks.closeRunningTasksContent: {count} task(s) are still running. Closing the app will terminate the running tasks. Continue?
tasks.closeCancelFailed: Failed to cancel tasks. The app stays open.
tasks.closeForceConfirmContent: {count} task(s) could not be cancelled. Force quitting will interrupt them. Continue?
tasks.closeForceFailed: Force quit failed. The app stays open.
tasks.closeFailed: Failed to close the window. The app stays open.
tasks.cancelConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to cancel this running task?
tasks.runningDescription: Shows queued and running separation tasks with stage progress, execution logs, and available operations.
tasks.historyDescription: Retains completed, failed, and cancelled task records for result review, error details, and logs.
tasks.removeSelectedContent: Delete the {count} selected task records? This only removes history entries and will not delete generated output files.
tasks.removeConfirmContent: Remove this task record? This only removes the history entry and will not delete generated output files.

models.title: Model Library
models.subtitle: Browse the model directory, download, and select models for audio separation.
models.search: Search by model name, architecture, or type...
models.empty: No model data. Load the model list to get started.
models.searchEmpty: No models match the current filters. Adjust the filters and try again.
models.deleteConfirmContent: Delete the local files for this model? This cannot be undone, but you can download it again later.
models.partialHint: Some files for this model already exist, but configuration or auxiliary files are still missing. This can happen for older users after upgrading; redownload the model to fill in the missing files.
models.storageCleanupConfirmContent: Delete {count} residual file(s), {size} in total? This cannot be undone. Confirm?
models.storageBatchDeleteConfirmContent: Delete local files for {count} model(s), {size} in total? This cannot be undone. Confirm?

results.title: Separation Results
results.subtitle: View audio files and output directories generated by completed tasks.
results.searchPlaceholder: Search by song name, model, stem, or output path
results.noMatchHint: Adjust the search keyword or clear filters.
results.emptyHint: Completed separation outputs will appear here.
results.removeSelectedContent: Remove the {count} selected item(s) from the results list?
results.clearContent: Clear all {count} result record(s) from the Results page?
results.removeContent: This removes the item from the results list.
results.removeDeleteFiles: Also move output files to trash
results.removeSelectedSuccess: Removed {count} item(s) from the results list
results.removeFilesFailed: Failed to move files to trash
results.removeFilesConfirmTitle: Some Files Could Not Be Deleted
results.removeFilesPartialListOnly: Removed from the results list only. {count} file(s) remain on disk.
results.removeFilesAllFailedListOnly: Removed from the results list only. Files remain on disk.
results.removeNoFilesSingle: Removed from results list. No output files were found to delete.
results.removeNoFilesMultiple: Removed from results list. No output files were found to delete.
results.removeFilesSuccessSingle: Result deleted, files moved to trash
results.removeFilesSuccessMultiple: Results deleted, files moved to trash
results.removeFilesConfirmContentSingle: {failed} of {total} output file(s) could not be moved to trash. Remove this item from the results list anyway?
results.removeFilesConfirmContentMultiple: {failed} of {total} output file(s) could not be moved to trash. Remove these items from the results list anyway?
results.removeFilesKeptSingle: The result was kept so you can retry file deletion later.
results.removeFilesKeptMultiple: The results were kept so you can retry file deletion later.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Open results in the editor, reveal output folders, or remove records.
projects.searchPlaceholder: Search by project name, task ID, or result folder
projects.emptyHint: Open a separation result in the editor, and its project will appear here.
projects.noMatchHint: Adjust the search keyword or clear the filter.
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete project “{name}”? This removes project files and assets only, and does not affect separation results.
projects.deleteSelectedConfirm: Delete the {count} selected project(s)? This removes their project directories and assets, but does not affect separation results.
projects.blankProjectHint: This project is not linked to a separation result folder.

editor.brandHint: Create a project from separation results, balance track volumes, and export the final mix.
editor.noProjectSelectedHint: Open a result in the editor from the Results page to create or reopen its project.
editor.exportDialogHint: Review the format and audio quality before exporting. Volume, mute / solo state, and fades from the timeline will all be baked into the final mix.
editor.exportProcessingValue: Master volume, track volume, mute / solo state, and fades
editor.exportSampleRateStrategyValue: Automatically follows the project source sample rate
editor.assetGroupLocalHint: From the separation output folder; can be dragged back into tracks anytime
editor.assetGroupExternalHint: Extra materials imported into the project; removable from the library
editor.assetDropIdle: Drop audio files or folders into this asset library
editor.assetDropActive: Release to add to asset library
editor.assetDropHint: Drop adds assets only; drag assets to the timeline to create tracks
editor.dropCreatesTrack: Release to create a reference track
editor.wheelHint: Wheel scrolls horizontally, Ctrl + wheel zooms
editor.stemTrackProtected: Stem tracks cannot be removed; only imported reference tracks can.
editor.assetMissingHint: This file is offline or moved. Please relink it to continue.
editor.assetOfflineBlocked: Missing assets exist. Please relink them first.
editor.offlineBannerTitle: {count} asset(s) are offline and need relinking
editor.clipParamsEmpty: Adjust this track’s volume, mute / solo state, and fades in this panel.
editor.emptyTimelineHint: Create a project from separation results, or import a reference track from the asset library.
editor.assetSearchEmptyHint: Try a different keyword, or clear the search to view all assets.
editor.assetRemovedWithTracks: Asset removed and {count} linked track(s) deleted
editor.assetLocalProtected: Local assets come from the separation results directory and cannot be removed from the asset library.
editor.removeAssetConfirmContent: Removing this asset will also delete {count} linked track(s). This cannot be undone. Continue?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage appearance, language, runtime environment, and default paths.
settings.appearanceHint: Theme, language, animations, and scale apply immediately. Scale uses fixed safe presets, and you can always restore the default.
settings.scaleFactorHint: Uses safe scale presets from 75% to 150%, applied immediately.
settings.animationsHint: Disable interface transitions and switching animations.
settings.runtimeDesc: Review runtime dependencies and available acceleration backends.
settings.modelDirChangeBlocked: Cannot change the model directory while tasks are running.
settings.modelDirSamePath: The selected directory is already the current model directory.
settings.modelDirCheckingHint: Checking the selected directory and preparing the migration plan. Please wait…
settings.modelDirMigrationConfirmLead: After confirmation, the app will copy, switch, and clean up the old directory in sequence. Do not close the app during migration.
settings.modelDirMigrationCloseWarning: Migration proceeds in three phases: copy → switch → clean up the old directory. Do not close the app during migration. Any filename conflicts will be resolved one by one during the copy phase.
settings.modelDirMigrationConflictHint: {count} potential filename conflict(s) detected. You will be prompted to resolve each one during the copy phase.
settings.modelDirMigrationConflictPrompt: A file with the same name already exists in the target directory. Choose how to continue.
settings.modelDirMigrationConflictApplyAll: This choice will be applied to later conflicts automatically.
settings.modelDirMigrationFailedHint: Migration failed. The current model directory is still in use.
settings.modelDirMigrationResidualHint: {count} residual or unknown file(s) remain in the old directory and were not migrated automatically.
settings.modelDirMigrationCleanupFailedHint: {count} file(s) or folders in the old directory could not be removed during cleanup. Please inspect the old directory manually.
settings.modelDirMigrationCloseBlocked: Model directory migration is in progress. Do not close the app.
settings.modelDirMigrationAbortedHint: Migration was aborted. Files already copied to the target directory will be retained; the old directory will not be cleaned up automatically.
settings.modelDirMigrationDiskInsufficientHint: Insufficient disk space on target partition: {available} available, ~{needed} required. Please choose a different location.
settings.envCheckHint: Use this panel to inspect the current environment when runtime or inference issues occur.
settings.maxConcurrentSeparationsHint: Supported range: 1 to 16. Keep this at 1 by default to avoid VRAM pressure. Increase only on multi-GPU or high-VRAM systems.
settings.developerModeHint: Keep more worker logs and expose runtime diagnostics for troubleshooting.

onboarding.title: Complete startup setup
onboarding.subtitle: Before entering this version for the first time, please finish these basics.
onboarding.languageDescription: You can lock a language now or let the app follow the system language automatically.
onboarding.themeDescription: The theme mode applies immediately and can still be changed later in Settings.
onboarding.accentDescription: Pick the accent palette you prefer and the whole app will update instantly.
onboarding.modelDirDescription: Models will be stored here by default. You can continue directly or switch to an existing model directory.
onboarding.modelDirReady: This directory is ready to use.
